headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Electronic Arts (EA) After A 63.6% Three Year Return?
summary: For investors considering whether Electronic Arts at around US$202 per share still offers value, or whether most of the potential upside is already reflected in the price, this breakdown is designed to help frame that question clearly. The stock has edged slightly lower over the past week and month, with returns of a 0.3% decline and a 0.7% decline, while still showing a 34.3% gain over 1 year and a 63.6% return over 3 years. These mixed short-term moves, alongside a stronger multi-year...
